wins.event: GIP acquisition announced — $150B combined infrastructure platform; doubles private markets fees to $1.5B+
Industry-leading $186B ETF net inflows; 6% organic asset growth
FY 2023 net inflows $289B; Q4 inflows $96B; entering Q1 2024 with run-rate +6% above Q4
Q4 EPS $9.66 (+8% YoY); operating margin 41.6% (+40bps YoY); FY EPS $37.77 (+7%)
Targeting $1.5B share repurchases in 2024; quarterly dividend raised 2% to $5.10/share

risks.event: FY operating margin 41.7% down 110bps from prior year
Restructuring charge $61M plus $28M one-time comp; ~3% workforce impacted
Index net outflows $55B in institutional from large client redemptions

guidance.notes: 5%+ through-the-cycle organic growth ambition reaffirmed; GIP modestly accretive to EPS in first full year post close. ACV growth low-to-mid teens long-term. 2024 G&A growth low-to-mid single digits.

_notes: GIP acquisition is transformational headline. Underlying FY results muted (flat revenue, margin compression) but Q4 inflows accelerating. CEO Larry Fink confident on private markets pivot.
